description_long: This is a large, L-shaped office desk with a dark wood grain finish and a modern, functional design. The desk features a spacious main work surface with a curved cutout for ergonomic access, and a secondary return section that provides additional workspace. On one side, there are three vertically stacked drawers with metallic handles, offering organized storage for office supplies. The opposite side includes open shelving for easy access to books, files, or equipment. The desk's construction appears sturdy, with thick panels and a combination of wood and laminate materials. A light gray panel on the return section adds a subtle contrast to the overall dark tone.
description: A large, L-shaped dark wood office desk with drawers, open shelves, and a contrasting light gray side panel. The design is modern and functional, suitable for professional or home office use.
description_view_0: The desk is seen from the back, highlighting the dark wood grain panels and the light gray side panel on the return section.
description_view_1: A side view showing the thickness of the desk panels and the open shelving beneath the return section.
description_view_2: The front view reveals three drawers with metallic handles on the left and open shelves on the right, as well as the curved cutout in the main work surface.
description_view_3: The opposite side view focuses on the open shelving and the depth of the return section, with the main work surface extending above.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the drawers and open shelves, with the curved cutout in the main work surface providing ergonomic access; the back and sides are solid panels.
attribute_usage_context: computer workstation or executive office desk
